evals.prompt: Here is the existing `App.css` for a landing page. It looks very basic and has some old styles. Please upgrade this CSS file to use a modern, premium aesthetic. Use things like glassmorphism, subtle gradients instead of flat borders, and nice hover effects on elements. Keep the same class names so the HTML doesn't break.
evals.expected_output: An upgraded `App.css` file with modern, premium styling principles applied.

evals.prompt: Here is the main `App.jsx` layout container. It currently uses basic Tailwind classes. Please upgrade the outer aesthetic of this layout. Maybe add a subtle animated gradient background, or ensure the layout has proper max-width constraints and looks like a high-end SaaS product.
evals.expected_output: An updated `App.jsx` showing enhanced Tailwind utility classes for a premium layout.
